structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Group Composition
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Each system shall be broken into separate Zone Groups composed of one or more zones served by a single air handler.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: System design must group zones into Zone Groups per single air handler.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Each system shall be broken into separate Zone Group s composed of a collection of one or more zones served by a single air handler.

evidence_quote: Each system shall be broken into separate Zone Group s composed of a collection of one or more zones served by a single air handler.
evidence_text: Each system shall be broken into separate Zone Group s composed of a collection of one or more zones served by a single air handler.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Separate Zone Group Schedules and Modes
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Each Zone Group shall be capable of having separate occupancy schedules and operating modes from other Zone Groups.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Zone Groups must support independent occupancy schedules and operating modes.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Each Zone Group  shall be capable of having separate occupancy schedules and operating modes  from other Zone Group s.

evidence_quote: Each Zone Group  shall be capable of having separate occupancy schedules and operating modes  from other Zone Group s.
evidence_text: Each Zone Group  shall be capable of having separate occupancy schedules and operating modes  from other Zone Group s.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Group Uniform Operating Mode
structured_payload_candidate.summary: All zones in each Zone Group shall be in the same zone-group operating mode as defined in Section 5.4.6.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: All zones in a Zone Group must be in the same operating mode.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: All zones in each Zone Group  shall be in the same zone -group operating mode  as defined in Section 5.4.6 .

evidence_quote: All zones in each Zone Group  shall be in the same zone -group operating mode  as defined in Section 5.4.6 .
evidence_text: All zones in each Zone Group  shall be in the same zone -group operating mode  as defined in Section 5.4.6 .

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Group Mode Propagation and Occupied-Standby Exception
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If one zone in a Zone Group is placed in any zone-group operating mode other than Unoccupied Mode, all zones in that Zone Group shall enter that mode. Occupied-standby mode is not a zone-group operating mode.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: One zone in a Zone Group is placed in any zone-group operating mode other than Unoccupied Mode (due to override, sequence logic, or scheduled occupancy).
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: All zones in that Zone Group shall enter that mode. Occupied-standby mode is a zonal subset of Occupied Mode and shall not be considered a zone-group operating mode, thus does not propagate.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If one zone in a Zone Group  is placed in any zone -group operating mode  other than Unoccupied Mode (due to override, sequence logic, or scheduled occupancy ), all zones in that Zone Gro up shall enter that mode. Occupied -standby mode applies to individual zones, is considered a zonal subset of Occupied Mode , and shall not be considered a zone-group operating mode .

evidence_quote: If one zone in a Zone Group  is placed in any zone -group operating mode  other than Unoccupied Mode (due to override, sequence logic, or scheduled occupancy ), all zones in that Zone Gro up shall enter that mode. Occupied -standby mode applies to individual zones, is considered a zonal subset of Occupied Mode , and shall not be considered a zone-group operating mode .
evidence_text: If one zone in a Zone Group  is placed in any zone -group operating mode  other than Unoccupied Mode (due to override, sequence logic, or scheduled occupancy ), all zones in that Zone Gro up shall enter that mode. Occupied -standby mode applies to individual zones, is considered a zonal subset of Occupied Mode , and shall not be considered a zone-group operating mode .

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Group Override Switch Propagation Logic
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When a Zone Group override switch is changed, all corresponding zone-level override switches change to the same value; zone-level switches can subsequently be changed independently without affecting the group switch, and the group switch only affects zone-level switches when it is changed.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Value of a Zone Group’s override switch is changed.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Corresponding override switch for every zone in the Zone Group shall change to the same value; subsequently, zone-level switch may be changed to different value; zone-level switch has no effect on zone-group switch; zone-group switch only affects zone-level switches when zone-group switch is changed.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the value of a Zone Group ’s override switch is changed, the corresponding override switch for every zone in the Zone Group  shall change to the same value. Subsequently, the zone -level override switch may be changed to a different valu e. The value of the zone -level switch has no effect on the value of the zone -group  switch, and the value of the zone -group  switch only affects the zone -level switches when the zone -group  switch is changed.

evidence_quote: When the value of a Zone Group ’s override switch is changed, the corresponding override switch for every zone in the Zone Group  shall change to the same value. Subsequently, the zone -level override switch may be changed to a different valu e. The value of the zone -level switch has no effect on the value of the zone -group  switch, and the value of the zone -group  switch only affects the zone -level switches when the zone -group  switch is changed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Group Operating Modes Requirement
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Each Zone Group shall have the operating modes shown in the following subsections (e.g., Occupied Mode, Unoccupied Mode, etc.).
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Implement the defined modes for each Zone Group.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Each Zone Group  shall have the modes shown in the following subsections.

evidence_quote: Each Zone Group  shall have the modes shown in the following subsections.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Group Occupied Mode Trigger
structured_payload_candidate.summary: A Zone Group is in Occupied Mode when the time is between scheduled occupied start and stop times, or the schedules have been overridden by the occupant override system.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Time of day between scheduled occupied start and stop times, or schedules overridden by occupant override system.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set Zone Group to Occupied Mode under these conditions.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: A Zone Group  is in the Occupied Mode  when any of the following is true: a. The time of day is between the Zone Group ’s scheduled occupied start and  stop times. b. The schedules have been overridden by the occupant override system.
